name: Disk usage API endpoint
description: Report storage consumption so operators can monitor growth and the UI can surface it. Returns bytes used per device plus the filesystem total/available. Uses os.Stat walks behind a small cache (60s) so it never becomes a hot path.
acceptance_criteria: internal/storage/usage.go adds Storage.Usage(ctx) (*UsageReport, error) returning { Devices: []{DongleID, Bytes, RouteCount}, TotalBytes, FilesystemTotalBytes, FilesystemAvailableBytes, ComputedAt time.Time }
Results are cached in-memory for 60 seconds to avoid repeated full walks; a forceRefresh bool flag or a ?refresh=1 query param invalidates the cache
Uses syscall.Statfs (or golang.org/x/sys unix.Statfs) for filesystem totals; portable to linux + darwin (project is developed on macOS, deployed on Linux)
GET /v1/storage/usage returns the report as JSON; requires JWT auth
internal/storage/usage_test.go covers a tmp STORAGE_PATH with a fabricated device/route tree and asserts byte counts + route counts
internal/api/*_test.go covers the HTTP endpoint end-to-end
go vet ./... and go build ./... pass cleanly
